_comment: ReaClaw configuration. Copy to {REAPER_RESOURCE_PATH}/reaclaw/config.json and edit.
_comment2: Find your REAPER resource path: REAPER menu → Options → Show REAPER resource path

learning._comment: Epic #20 — local-first, opt-in correction mining. Off by default; nothing is recorded or leaves the machine unless enabled.

semantic_search._comment: Issue #10 — opt-in, loopback-only embedding-based catalog search via a local Ollama instance. Off by default; see ReaClaw_TECH_DECISIONS.md §25.
